# KORAVA Builder Copilot Instructions

As an AI agent, follow these rules when contributing code:

- Keep files small and focused on one responsibility.
- Use meaningful names for modules, classes, functions, and variables.
- Favor dependency injection over hard-coded dependencies.
- Avoid duplicating logic; reuse shared helpers and services.
- Write code that compiles cleanly under strict TypeScript.
- Update documentation for any behavior or architecture changes.
- Prefer concise and maintainable implementations over clever shortcuts.
- Build the project before committing or reporting completion.
